item.title: Stress-Testing the Moat: Four Threats That Could Rewrite the AI Supply Chain
item.description: TurboQuant, HBM demand reversal, geopolitics, and glass substrates — not a doomsday scenario, but a disciplined analysis.

item.description: Four pressure vectors. Four clocks are already ticking.The question is not whether these moats will last forever — It’s whether you know which one breaks first.TurboQuant, HBM demand reversal, geopoli

item.title: How Deep Is the Moat? Reading TSMC, SK Hynix, and Micron Through Their SEC Filings
item.description: Customer prepayments, HBM margin structure, capital expenditure intensity — the numbers say more than the narratives do.

item.title: The Real AI Supply Chain: A Power Map Beyond the GPU
item.description: From TSMC to SK Hynix to Ajinomoto — who holds pricing power, and who is just riding the narrative?

item.title: # Article 2 | The Real AI Supply Chain: A Power Map Beyond the GPU
item.description: The AI compute supply chain: three layers, three chokepoints, one power map.From TSMC to SK Hynix to Ajinomoto — who holds pricing power, and who is just riding the narrative?**Series:** AI Compute Su
